cases.passage: As I stepped out of the airport in New York, I couldn't help but feel a mix of excitement and nervousness. I had just arrived in the city that never sleeps, and I had a week to explore it. My plan was to visit all the iconic landmarks, try some of the world's best food, and soak up the vibrant energy of the city. I had booked a hostel in the heart of Manhattan, close to Times Square and Central Park. The next morning, I set out to explore the city, starting with the Statue of Liberty. I took the subway to the pier, where I boarded a ferry to Liberty Island. As I walked up to the statue, I felt a sense of awe and wonder. It was even more magnificent than I had imagined.

questions.q: What was the narrator's plan for the week in New York?
opts: To visit only the Statue of Liberty
To explore all the iconic landmarks
To try only the street food
questions.explanation: The narrator had planned to visit all the iconic landmarks, try some of the world's best food, and soak up the vibrant energy of the city.

questions.q: Where was the narrator staying in New York?
opts: In a hostel in the heart of Manhattan
In a hotel in Central Park
questions.explanation: The narrator had booked a hostel in the heart of Manhattan, close to Times Square and Central Park.

questions.q: How did the narrator travel to Liberty Island?
questions.explanation: The narrator took the subway to the pier, where she boarded a ferry to Liberty Island.

questions.q: What did the narrator feel as she walked up to the Statue of Liberty?
opts: A sense of awe and wonder
questions.explanation: The narrator felt a sense of awe and wonder as she walked up to the statue.

questions.q: What was the narrator's first destination in New York?
questions.explanation: The narrator's first destination was the Statue of Liberty.

cases.passage: As I walked through the bustling streets of Tokyo, I couldn't help but feel overwhelmed by the sheer number of people and the vibrant colors of the billboards. I had just arrived in Japan, and I had a few days to explore the city. My plan was to visit all the famous temples and shrines, try some of the local cuisine, and experience the unique culture of the city. I had booked a small apartment in the heart of Shibuya, close to the famous scramble crossing. The next morning, I set out to explore the city, starting with the Meiji Shrine. I took the subway to the shrine, where I spent a few hours walking through the peaceful gardens and admiring the beautiful architecture.

questions.q: Where was the narrator staying in Tokyo?
opts: In a hotel in the heart of Shibuya
In a small apartment in the heart of Shibuya
In a hostel in the heart of Shinjuku
In a hotel in the heart of Harajuku
questions.explanation: The narrator had booked a small apartment in the heart of Shibuya, close to the famous scramble crossing.

questions.q: What was the narrator's plan for the few days in Tokyo?
opts: To visit only the famous shopping districts
To try only the street food
To visit all the famous temples and shrines, try some of the local cuisine, and experience the unique culture of the city
questions.explanation: The narrator had planned to visit all the famous temples and shrines, try some of the local cuisine, and experience the unique culture of the city.

questions.q: How did the narrator travel to the Meiji Shrine?
questions.explanation: The narrator took the subway to the shrine.

questions.q: What did the narrator spend a few hours doing at the Meiji Shrine?
opts: Walking through the peaceful gardens and admiring the beautiful architecture
questions.explanation: The narrator spent a few hours walking through the peaceful gardens and admiring the beautiful architecture.

questions.q: What was the narrator's first destination in Tokyo?
questions.explanation: The narrator's first destination was the Meiji Shrine.
